page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.xlarge is an arm64-based server instance powered by the Alibaba Yitian710 processor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and has a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are included.

Performance benchmarks indicate average capabilities across multiple workloads. The single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests fall within the average range, as do the bzip3 decompression and redis SET operations, which achieve 6.4 million operations per second. However, the instance exhibits weaknesses in specific areas, including a weak PassMark CPU score and poor performance in CPU encryption tests. Memory bandwidth is average for read operations but drops to the bottom 25% for large-block write operations.

Given its arm64 architecture and high memory density, the ecs.r8y.xlarge offers a resource-dense profile suitable for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high-performance local storage or specialized cryptographic acceleration. It is well-suited for database operations, caching layers like Redis, and general-purpose memory-optimized tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.xlarge is an arm64-based server instance powered by the 2.75 GHz Alibaba Yitian710 processor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores, 32.0 GB of memory, and no local storage, operating on the KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. With 8.0 GB of RAM per core, this instance is positioned as a memory-optimized resource. Benchmark data shows average performance in stress-ng CPU tests, bzip3 decompression, and redis SET operations, which reach 6.4 million operations per second. However, it exhibits weak performance in PassMark CPU scores and large-block memory write bandwidth, alongside poor cryptographic execution. This instance is best suited for memory-intensive workloads such as database operations, caching layers, and general-purpose arm64 applications that do not require local SSD storage or heavy cryptographic processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.xlarge is an arm64 memory-optimized server featuring 4 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 32 GB RAM, and a 3 Gbps network baseline, suitable for database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.xlarge is an arm64 server with 4 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 32 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth for memory-intensive tasks.
tagline: An arm64-based, memory-optimized virtual server with dedicated processor cores designed for memory-intensive workloads and caching applications.
bullet_points: Powered by Alibaba Yitian710 arm64 processor with 4 dedicated cores
Equipped with 32.0 GB of memory (8.0 GB per core)
Baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps with no local storage
Average performance in Redis operations and bzip3 decompression
Weak performance in cryptographic tests and large-block memory writes
Suited for database operations, caching, and memory-intensive arm64 tasks
